description: Kenneth and David discuss NFT tips for artists and collectors, the growth of Binance NFT Marketplace, and new features including deposit options. They emphasize the platform's user-friendliness and community engagement.
topic_summary: In this webinar, Kenneth and David provide insights into the Binance NFT Marketplace, covering its features, best practices for artists and collectors, and upcoming functionalities. They highlight the importance of community and the platform's broad offerings in the NFT space [t=174.62].
